first_run.rationale: The score is identical (5/10), and the core reasoning remains unchanged across both evaluations. Both versions identify the candidate as overqualified, note their minimal German proficiency for a Berlin-based role, and question their focus on niche technologies. The minor variations in phrasing for strengths and concerns are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment due to the candidate's location changing from Berlin to Lagos.
